chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1524 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocates files vakalatnama as well as statement / compliance report, which are taken on record. He submits that original cheque of Rs.200000/- has already been handed over to the Petitioner, whereas, for the remaining amount, he undertakes that post-dated cheques for Rs.200000/- will be handed over to the Petitioner for payment of outstanding amount, which shall be en-cashed every month before 10th of the Month. On such statement, Counsel for the petitioner being satisfied, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Order accordingly and the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
